scripts.dev:worker: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- npm --prefix worker run dev
scripts.dev:all: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- concurrently "npm run dev" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.ai:serve:local: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- supabase functions serve ai-chat --no-verify-jwt
scripts.build: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- npm run build:production
scripts.build:production: tsc -b && FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.prod.template" -- vite build
scripts.build:preview-local: tsc -b && FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- tsx scripts/build-preview-local.ts
scripts.link:local: yalc link @rhizome/core oosync && cd worker && yalc link oosync
scripts.unlink:local: yalc remove --all && npm install && cd worker && yalc remove --all && npm install
scripts.prep-for-ci-oosync: npm update oosync --package-lock-only && npm update oosync --package-lock-only --prefix worker && echo '✅ Lockfile oosync entry updated for CI. Local yalc links preserved!'
scripts.prep-for-ci-rhizome: npm update @rhizome/core --package-lock-only && echo '✅ Lockfile @rhizome/core entry updated for CI. Local yalc links preserved!'
scripts.lint: biome lint src e2e tests worker
scripts.format: biome format --write src e2e tests worker
scripts.format:check: biome format src e2e tests worker
scripts.check: biome check src e2e tests worker
scripts.fix: biome check --write src e2e tests worker
scripts.db:local:reset: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright clear-cache && RESET_DB=true FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright test --reporter=list e2e/setup/auth.setup.ts --project=setup
scripts.db:dump-migration: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- npx supabase db dump --local --schema public -f supabase/migrations/20241101000000_initial_schema.sql
scripts.db:dump-seed: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- npx supabase db dump --local --data-only --schema public -f supabase/seed.sql
scripts.db:remote:backup: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.prod.template" -- node scripts/run-rhizome-db-remote-backup.mjs --schema public --schema auth
scripts.db:remote:apply-top500: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.prod.template" -- supabase db execute --linked --file supabase/seeds/rsTop500.sql
scripts.test:unit: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- vitest run tests/
scripts.test:e2e:both:ci: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright test --project=chromium-auth --project=chromium --project='Mobile Chrome'
scripts.test:e2e:chromium:mobile: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright test --project='Mobile Chrome' --reporter=list
scripts.test:e2e:chromium:both: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright test --project=chromium-auth --project=chromium --project='Mobile Chrome' --reporter=list
scripts.test:e2e:chromium:both:html: mkdir -p ./logs && FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright test --project=chromium-auth --project=chromium --project='Mobile Chrome' --reporter=list,html
scripts.test:e2e:chromium:all:html: mkdir -p ./logs && FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright test --project=chromium-auth  --project=chromium-pwa-offline --project=chromium --project='Mobile Chrome' --reporter=list,html
scripts.audit:summary: npm audit || echo '⚠️  Known dev-only vulnerabilities (esbuild, lodash.template) - see SECURITY.md'
